name: Mushroom Soup (Prodigy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 2-quart pot over medium heat on the stove.
2. Add onions and cook covered, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes or until onions are soft.
3. Add mushrooms, replace the cover, and continue cooking another 10 minutes.
4. Add sherry, thyme, salt, and pepper.
5. Sprinkle onion/mushroom mixture with flour and cook, stirring, about a minute.
6. Add milk and cream, cover, and simmer for 10 more minutes.
7. Do not let the soup come to a rolling boil or the milk will curdle.
8. Serve the hot soup immediately.
